formulas.name: 1. Forest Area Percentage
formulas.formula: Forest Area % = (Forest Area / Total Geographical Area) × 100
formulas.notes: To calculate the percentage of forest area in a region

formulas.name: 2. Water Pollution Index
formulas.variables: DO (Dissolved Oxygen), BOD (Biochemical Oxygen Demand), COD (Chemical Oxygen Demand), pH
formulas.notes: To calculate the water pollution index

formulas.name: 3. Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) Ratio
formulas.formula: EIA Ratio = (Total Environmental Losses / Total Environmental Benefits)
formulas.variables: Total Environmental Losses, Total Environmental Benefits
formulas.notes: To assess the environmental impact of a project

formulas.name: 4. Carbon Footprint
formulas.notes: To calculate the carbon footprint of a region or individual

formulas.name: 5. Biodiversity Index
formulas.notes: To calculate the biodiversity index of a region

formulas.name: 6. Renewable Energy Percentage
formulas.notes: To calculate the percentage of renewable energy in the total energy mix

formulas.name: 7. Waste Management Efficiency
formulas.notes: To calculate the waste management efficiency of a region

formulas.name: 8. Ecological Footprint
formulas.notes: To calculate the ecological footprint of a region or individual

formulas.name: 9. Sustainable Development Index
formulas.notes: To calculate the sustainable development index of a region

formulas.name: 10. Greenhouse Gas Emissions Reduction Target
formulas.formula: GHGER = (Current Emissions - Target Emissions) / Current Emissions × 100
formulas.notes: To calculate the greenhouse gas emissions reduction target
